name: agent-trio
description: Principled agentic coding: plan, build, review, and learn with builder and reviewer agents.

interface.shortDescription: Run a plan, build, review, learn loop in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agent Trio adds a lightweight workflow contract for Codex: plan the work, build in a separate role, review against held-out criteria, and record durable learnings.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-trio to plan, build, review, and learn.
